title: FLUX.2 [pro] Small Validation Prompts v1 — 월급이 3일 만에 사라지는 이유 (4 scenes, benchmark-anchored)
purpose: OpenAI recommended 3장 benchmark 대비 FLUX.2 [pro]가 강화 no-text/blank-object 계약을 따라오는지 소량 검증. scene 1/2/3은 benchmark와 직접 비교, scene 5는 missing coverage 중 FLUX2 약점(달력 숫자·동전/지폐 통화 디테일) 검증용.
sceneSelectionRationale: scene 4(subscriptions_auto_pay)는 화면 타일이 주인공인 구도라 FLUX2 contract의 'screen device 최소화' 요건과 충돌하므로 이번 4장에서 제외. scene 5가 FLUX2의 실측 실패 유형(숫자/인쇄물)을 달력·동전으로 정면 검증하면서 missing coverage도 채운다.
hardRuleHead: HARD RULE, HIGHEST PRIORITY — THIS IMAGE MUST CONTAIN ZERO READABLE MARKS: no text, no letters, no numerals, no digits, no words, no labels, no logos, no brand marks, no watermarks, no signatures, no UI chrome, no icons, no handwriting, no printed lines, anywhere in the frame.
hardRuleTail: FINAL CHECK BEFORE RENDERING: every paper, slip, envelope, card, calculator, calendar, coin and screen in this image is completely blank and unmarked — if any letter, numeral, logo or interface element would appear, replace it with plain blank surface or pure abstract light. Zero glyphs of any kind.

prompts.subjectDeliveryCheck: 월급이 방금 들어온 순간임이 이미지만으로 느껴진다
prompts.noTextRiskFocus: 폰 화면 — FLUX2 1차 테스트에서 한글 유사 텍스트+UI chrome 위반이 발생한 지점
prompts.finalPrompt: HARD RULE, HIGHEST PRIORITY — THIS IMAGE MUST CONTAIN ZERO READABLE MARKS: no text, no letters, no numerals, no digits, no words, no labels, no logos, no brand marks, no watermarks, no signatures, no UI chrome, no icons, no handwriting, no printed lines, anywhere in the frame. Premium editorial financial-life explainer still, cinematic, photographic realism (not 3D, not illustration, not animation), high detail, sharp focus, vertical 9:16 frame. Calm warm-neutral editorial color grade with a single amber/warm-yellow accent. Grounded, believable Korean household morning — not an advertisement, not a posed stock photo. Face-minimized: only hands, objects and space. Keep the lower third and the top strip of the frame relatively clean for overlay cards. Scene subject: Close-up on a warm wooden kitchen table in early morning light. A smartphone lies face-up. Treat the phone screen as dark switched-off glass catching one single soft round blur of warm amber light — purely abstract glow, like a reflection on black glass, with absolutely nothing displayed: no notification, no icons, no status bar, no interface, no characters of any language. A visibly thin open wallet rests beside the phone; a hand enters the frame reaching toward the phone; a cup of coffee steams softly. Mood: one short breath of relief before the money starts leaving. Shallow depth of field, warm window light. No distorted hands, no visible face in focus, no stock-photo feel. FINAL CHECK BEFORE RENDERING: every paper, slip, envelope, card, calculator, calendar, coin and screen in this image is completely blank and unmarked — if any letter, numeral, logo or interface element would appear, replace it with plain blank surface or pure abstract light. Zero glyphs of any kind.

prompts.subjectDeliveryCheck: 돈이 정해진 순서로 '빠져나가는 중'이라는 방향성이 보인다

prompts.noTextRiskFocus: 지폐 숫자/영수증 문자열 — FLUX2 1차 테스트에서 '500' 지폐 숫자와 영수증 텍스트 위반이 발생한 지점

Scene subject: A home desk at night in the middle band of the frame. On top of the stack rests a single minimalist payment card shown as a plain dark card with only a metallic chip — no numbers, no name, no brand, no embossing. Beside the stack: one plain unmarked envelope and a small calculator whose display is dark and switched off, its keys plain and completely unlabeled blank buttons. prompts.coreIdea: 3일 뒤 빈 지갑 (missing coverage — OpenAI billing limit로 미생성)
prompts.subjectDeliveryCheck: 3일이 지났고 지갑이 비었다는 시간 경과가 보인다
prompts.noTextRiskFocus: 달력 숫자 + 동전 각인 — FLUX2가 숫자/인쇄물에서 실패했던 유형을 달력 grid와 동전으로 정면 검증
prompts.finalPrompt: HARD RULE, HIGHEST PRIORITY — THIS IMAGE MUST CONTAIN ZERO READABLE MARKS: no text, no letters, no numerals, no digits, no words, no labels, no logos, no brand marks, no watermarks, no signatures, no UI chrome, no icons, no handwriting, no printed lines, anywhere in the frame. A paper desk calendar stands slightly out of focus showing ONLY an empty ruled grid of blank cells — absolutely no numbers, no letters, no month name, no weekday marks, every cell empty — with exactly three of its cells swiped by a warm amber highlighter, reading purely as 'three days passed'. The contrast between the three amber marks and the empty wallet tells the whole story without a single word. Textures of paper and worn leather, warm-neutral grade.
